---
title: "Popup Plot Example"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
filters:
  - pyodide
execute:
  enabled: false
  echo: true
  code-fold: true
  code-summary: "Show code"
---

## Click to open plot in a floating window

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| code-fold: false

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from io import BytesIO
import base64
from js import window

# Create the plot
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 4))  # size in inches
ax.plot([0, 1, 2], [0, 1, 0])
ax.set_title("Popup Plot")

# Save to buffer
buf = BytesIO()
fig.savefig(buf, format="png", bbox_inches='tight')
buf.seek(0)
b64_image = base64.b64encode(buf.read()).decode("utf-8")
buf.close()

# Estimate pixel dimensions (DPI * size in inches)
dpi = fig.dpi
width_px = int(fig.get_size_inches()[0] * dpi)
height_px = int(fig.get_size_inches()[1] * dpi)

# Inject into popup
html = f"<html><head><title>Popup Plot</title></head><body style='margin:0'><img src='data:image/png;base64,{b64_image}' style='display:block'></body></html>"
popup = window.open("", "_blank", f"width={width_px},height={height_px}")
popup.document.write(html)
popup.document.close()
```
